DashboardFind Smart Route

Know the route before the road.
Travel smarter every day.

with TransitWin

TransitWin analyzes traffic, transport networks, and real-time mobility data to recommend the fastest and most sustainable routes for daily commuters.

Find Smart RouteView Live Traffic

COMMUTING SHOULD NOT
WASTE YOUR TIME.

Traffic congestion, inefficient routes, and disconnected transport systems turn every commute into a stressful experience. We built TransitWin to change that.

Before TransitWin

  • • Traffic delays
  • • Confusing routes
  • • Lost commute time

With TransitWin

  • • Optimized routes
  • • Faster travel
  • • Lower emissions

Features

Smart Route Optimization

Get the fastest route considering real-time traffic and transport schedules.

Multi Transport Integration

Seamlessly combine local train, bus, cab, and walking for optimal journeys.

Real-Time Traffic Visualization

Live congestion maps help you make informed commuting decisions.

Smart City Mobility Insights

Urban planning data for smarter, more connected cities.

How It Works

Step 1

Enter your route

Input origin and destination

Step 2

Collect traffic data

Aggregate real-time mobility feeds

Step 3

AI predicts congestion

LSTM models forecast traffic

Step 4

Route optimization engine

Multi-criteria optimization

Step 5

Best route recommendation

Get your smart commute

faster route discovery

0%

congestion reduction

0%

Interactive product preview

Andheri → BKC

Car → 25 min

Vision

Long-term roadmap for smarter mobility

AI Mobility Intelligence

Predictive models for seamless urban travel.

Smart Traffic Signal Systems

IoT-connected signals for adaptive flow.

EV Charging Integration

Plan routes with charging stops for EVs.

Global Smart City Network

Scale to cities worldwide.
